translations.en: a plainly dressed bard.
translations.zh: 一位穿著樸素的吟遊詩人。

translations.en: "Is there something you needed to know?"
translations.zh: 「有什麼是汝需要知道的嗎？」

translations.en: "Hello, $P."
"It's me, Gwenno. You have been away from our realm a long time, haven't you..."
translations.zh: 「是吾，葛溫諾。汝離開吾等的王國很久了，對嗎……」

translations.en: "Iolo's @apprentice has taken over my job at @Iolo's Bows."
translations.zh: 「尤洛的@apprentice（學徒）已接手吾在@Iolo（尤洛）弓箭店的工作。」

translations.en: "These days I've been transcribing the folk @songs of Britannia into numerical @notation for the artisan's @guild."
translations.zh: 「近來吾一直在為工匠@songs（歌謠），將不列顛尼亞的民間@notation（記譜法）轉錄成數字@guild（公會）。」

translations.en: "Of course, helping you on your quest is more important than that right now."
translations.zh: 「當然，眼下協助汝完成任務比那更重要。」

translations.en: "Of course, if you need my help, I could leave the guild for a time and @join you."
translations.zh: 「當然，若汝需要吾的幫助，吾可以暫別公會，@join（入伙）汝。」

translations.en: "@Selganor can tell you more about the guild than I could."
translations.zh: 「@Selganor（瑟爾）嘉諾比吾更能告訴汝關於公會的事。」

translations.en: "He's the guildmaster."
translations.zh: 「他是公會會長。」

translations.en: "The songs of a people are an important part of their heritage."
translations.zh: 「一個民族的歌謠是其文化遺產的重要組成部分。」

translations.en: "Putting them down on paper helps preserve our @traditions for future generations."
translations.zh: 「將它們記錄在紙上，有助於為後代保存吾等的@traditions（傳統）。」

translations.en: "I'm so glad you appreciate the value of tradition."
translations.zh: 「吾很高興汝理解傳統的價值。」

translations.en: "A bit scruffy, but he's the sweetest husband I could ever ask for."
translations.zh: 「有點蓬頭垢面，但他是吾所能期望最可愛的丈夫。」

translations.en: Iolo says "You're only saying that because it's true." He gives her a kiss.
translations.zh: 尤洛說：「汝這樣說，只是因為這是實話。」他吻了她一下。

translations.en: "If you need a good crossbow, the shop is in Britain, over by the Blue @Boar."
translations.zh: 「若汝需要一把好弩，店就在不列顛城，藍野豬@Boar（酒館）附近。」

translations.en: "It's a lively place."
translations.zh: 「那是個熱鬧的地方。」

translations.en: "A number for every @note, and a note for every @number."
translations.zh: 「每個@note（音符）對應一個數字，每個數字對應一個@number（數字）。」

translations.en: "Each note is represented by one @number."
translations.zh: 「每個音符由一個@number（數字）表示。」

translations.en: "Each number @represents one @note."
translations.zh: 「每個數字@represents（對應）一個@note（音符）。」

translations.en: "I knew you'd catch on!"
translations.zh: 「吾就知道汝能理解！」

translations.en: "Oh, Selganor sent you, did he? I bet you want to learn '@Stones.'"
translations.zh: 「哦，瑟爾嘉諾派汝來的嗎？吾猜汝想學@Stones《石頭》。」

translations.en: "In the standard numerical notation, it reads '678987 8767653'."
"Nice talking with you."
translations.zh: 「很高興與汝交談。」

translations.en: "Sorry, can't help you there."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，那件事吾幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "I have joined you already!"
translations.zh: 「吾已經加入汝了！」

translations.en: "Do you want me to come with you?"
translations.zh: 「汝要吾跟汝同行嗎？」

translations.en: "Okay. Let me know if you need my help later."
translations.zh: 「好吧。若之後需要吾，儘管告訴吾。」

translations.en: "Not while you're in that thing!"
translations.zh: 「只要汝還在那東西裡，吾就不加入！」

translations.en: "You have enough travelling with you already."
translations.zh: 「汝已經有足夠的同行者了。」

translations.en: "If you ask one of them to @leave first, I'd be happy to join you."
translations.zh: 「若汝請他們中的一人先@leave（離隊），吾很樂意加入。」

translations.en: "Okay! It will be nice to spend some time on the road again."
translations.zh: 「好！再次踏上旅途真是太好了。」

translations.en: She runs over and hooks arms with @Iolo, and they dance around and around.
translations.zh: 她跑過去挽著@Iolo（尤洛）的手臂，兩人轉啊轉地跳舞。

translations.en: They're obviously very happy to see each other again.
translations.zh: 他們顯然非常高興再次相見。

translations.en: "I'd have to @join you before I could leave, silly!"
translations.zh: 「吾得先@join（入伙）汝，才能談離開，傻瓜！」

translations.en: "Let's get our feet back on solid ground first, okay?"
translations.zh: 「讓吾等先回到陸地上再說，好嗎？」

translations.en: "All right. I'll head back home to Minoc. Come let me know if you need me to join you again later."
translations.zh: 「好吧。吾回密諾克的家了。若你之後需要吾再次加入，來告訴吾。」

translations.en: "I'll leave all my things here - some of them might come in handy for you."
translations.zh: 「吾把所有東西留在這裡——有些或許對汝有用。」

translations.en: She gives Iolo a big hug before she leaves.
translations.zh: 她離去前給了尤洛一個大大的擁抱。

translations.en: "Remember to keep your socks dry," she says, "and I'll see you when the quest is done."
translations.zh: 「記得保持襪子乾燥，」她說，「任務結束時再見。」

translator_notes: 葛溫諾是尤洛的妻子，現任職密諾克工匠公會，將民間歌謠轉錄成數字記譜法。她能教導《石頭》曲調（678987 8767653），這是加入公會的必要條件。她和尤洛的感情甜蜜，相遇時的互動令人動容。
